business_ideas.idea: Twerkout classes - fitness franchise teaching twerking, sold out months in advance nationally
Fecal microbiota transplants from elite athletes - sell superior microbiomes to improve endurance
BBL recovery product line - pillows, apps, recovery centers for post-surgery patients
Gut/digestive health clinic franchise - Gastroenterology focused spas like med spas but for GI health
Auxiliary products for health trends (tracking apps, supplement boosters for Ozempic users)
Grindr turnaround - acquire undervalued dating app, replace team, rebuild product systematically

predictions.text: Fecal microbiota transplants will become a mainstream performance enhancement in 5-10 years
Every major health trend will spawn profitable auxiliary product categories similar to Ozempic
